series_metadata.series_description: Record contains all pre-2017 Sales Agent Applications and Agreements. Each Agent Application and Agreement identifies the business ownership, name, address, credit references, answers to questions pertinent to O.R.C. 3770.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area for the duration of active Sales Agent License, plus two (2) years, then destroy. For cancellation/denial applications, retain for two (2) years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
